meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Master AI-driven debugging to ship faster. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to eliminate roadblocks and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing syntax errors manually. By shifting your workflow to AI-assisted design and automated debugging, you treat code as a modular output of logic rather than a manual chore. Using Antigravity to architect and Claude Code to execute, you can isolate, diagnose, and patch complex bugs in minutes, not hours.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with an unhandled promise rejection, and the client deadline is breathing down your neck. You are trapped in a recursive cycle of console logs and Stack Overflow rabbit holes, watching your profit margins evaporate as hours tick away into an abyss of technical debt.

But what if you stopped 'writing' code and started 'designing' it? By leveraging high-context AI agents, you move from a frantic manual debugger to a high-level systems architect. This is the shift that separates the burnt-out freelancers from the elite builders who ship high-quality products at 10x speed.

steps.title: Architecting the Logic Flow
steps.description: Before touching the code, use Antigravity to define the expected state transitions. This prevents debugging by forcing architectural clarity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file architecture. Map out the state dependencies and identify potential points of failure in the async data flow. Propose a refactored structure that eliminates hidden side effects.

steps.title: Automated Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create a reproduction script. This isolates the logic, ensuring the AI is debugging the root cause, not the symptoms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a minimal reproduction test suite for the current unhandled exception occurring in the auth module.

steps.title: Context-Aware Patching
steps.description: Feed the stack trace and the architectural map into Claude Code to generate a surgical fix that maintains existing patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the architectural map, apply a patch to the auth module that handles the edge case without introducing regression in the user session state.

steps.title: Regression Verification
steps.description: Run an automated check to ensure the fix hasn't broken peripheral features, maintaining client trust through stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the patch against the existing codebase and simulate potential regression impacts on the API layer.

steps.title: Systemic Documentation
steps.description: Document the fix so you never debug the same issue twice, increasing your long-term efficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the project documentation to include a 'Troubleshooting' section regarding this specific logic flow.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'System Map' in your root directory; AI agents perform 40% better when provided with an explicit architectural schema.
Use Claude Code's '--diff' flag to manually review changes before merging; never let an agent commit directly to production.
If an AI suggests a complex fix, ask it to 'explain the trade-offs' to ensure you aren't incurring technical debt for speed.
Keep your context window clean by deleting temporary test files after each debugging session to prevent the AI from hallucinating about non-existent dependencies.
Use 'Chain-of-Thought' prompting in Antigravity by asking the AI to 'reason step-by-step' before generating code to drastically reduce logic errors.
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on one minor bug fix this week, then scale it to your entire codebase as you gain confidence in the agentic loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Master the tools that allow you to ship faster and work smarter. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
